description: You are a 2nd-grade teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a weekly lesson plan for a literacy unit in the Sugar Write activity. Create a structured lesson plan document containing a 'Learning Objectives' section with at least two objectives, a 'Daily Schedule' section with a table of 5 columns (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday) and at least 2 rows of activities, and an 'Assessment' section describing measurement of student progress. Save the document as an ODT file to /home/ga/Documents/literacy_plan.odt and ensure the Sugar Journal entry is titled 'Literacy Plan Week 3'.
